Button.tooltip: Run production posting for selected item
Preview field mapping for selected item

Title.text: Manage Field Mapping Rules for Extraction

MessageStrip.text: Constant fields (Lockbox, LockboxBatchOrigin, LockboxBatchDestination) can be edited below. Partner Bank details are fetched from Business Partner API when available, otherwise defaults are used.

Dialog.title: Field Mapping Preview - Complete SAP Payload

MessageStrip.text: This view shows all API fields organized by SAP payload hierarchy: Header → Item → Clearing. Fields marked as SYSTEM are auto-generated, CONSTANT are fixed values, DEFAULT use configured fallbacks, and DIRECT are mapped from your file.
